# satgate

> satgate is a pay-per-token inference proxy for any OpenAI-compatible endpoint — Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp, or any API that speaks the OpenAI format. Clients pay per token using Lightning, Cashu, or NWC (Nostr Wallet Connect); no accounts, no API keys, instant settlement. Stablecoin payments via x402 are coming. Powered by toll-booth under the hood.

One command turns a local inference server into a billable API endpoint. satgate auto-detects your models, issues L402 payment challenges, proxies requests once paid, counts actual tokens from the response, and reconciles any overpayment back to the client's credit balance.

## Live Demo

A public instance is running at https://satgate.trotters.dev — open it in a browser for the chat playground, or point any OpenAI-compatible client at it. Discovery endpoints:

- https://satgate.trotters.dev/.well-known/l402
- https://satgate.trotters.dev/llms.txt
- https://satgate.trotters.dev/openapi.json

## Getting Started

```bash
npx satgate --upstream http://localhost:11434
```

That's all that's needed. satgate queries `/v1/models` on startup, begins accepting payments, and proxies inference traffic to your backend. For production, create `satgate.yaml`:

```yaml
upstream: http://localhost:11434
port: 3000
storage: sqlite
dbPath: ./satgate.db

pricing:
  default: 1          # sats per 1k tokens for unlisted models
  models:
    llama3: 1
    deepseek-r1: 5
    mixtral-8x22b: 3

freeTier:
  creditsPerDay: 250

capacity:
  maxConcurrent: 4

tiers:
  - amountSats: 1000
    creditSats: 1000
    label: "1,000 sats"
  - amountSats: 5000
    creditSats: 5500
    label: "5,000 sats (10% bonus)"
  - amountSats: 10000
    creditSats: 11100
    label: "10,000 sats (11% bonus)"
```

## Key Concepts

- **Model pricing** — per-model rates in sats per 1,000 tokens. Unlisted models fall back to the `default` rate. Resolution order: exact match → case-insensitive match → Ollama tag stripping (`llama3:latest` → `llama3`) → default. Token costs always round up so the operator is never short-changed.
- **Token counting** — three priority sources. Priority 1: usage field from a buffered (non-streaming) JSON response. Priority 2: usage field from the final SSE chunk when `stream_options: { include_usage: true }` is set. Priority 3: content chunk count (1 chunk ≈ 1 token) as a fallback for streams that omit usage data.
- **Capacity management** — `maxConcurrent` limits how many inference requests run simultaneously. Requests that arrive when all slots are occupied receive a 503. Set to `0` to disable the limit.
- **Free tier** — optional per-IP daily allowance. Requests within the daily limit pass through without any payment challenge. Resets at midnight UTC.
- **Payment tiers with volume discounts** — clients choose a tier amount when funding their balance. Each tier can grant bonus credit (e.g. pay 5,000 sats, receive 5,500 in credit), incentivising larger upfront payments.
- **Cost reconciliation** — when a request arrives, an estimated sat amount is deducted from the client's balance upfront (based on model price and a configurable estimate). After the response completes and tokens are counted, the actual cost is reconciled. Any overpayment is credited back immediately.

## Supported Inference Endpoints

These endpoints require a valid L402 credential (pay once, use until credit runs out):

- `POST /v1/chat/completions` — chat completions, streaming and buffered
- `POST /v1/completions` — legacy text completions
- `POST /v1/embeddings` — embedding generation

## Discovery Endpoints

These endpoints require no authentication and are designed for machine consumption:

- `GET /.well-known/l402` — machine-readable service descriptor: pricing per model, available tiers, payment methods, and model list
- `GET /llms.txt` — this file, served dynamically with live pricing and model data
- `GET /openapi.json` — OpenAPI 3.1 specification for client code generation
- `GET /v1/models` — standard OpenAI model listing, proxied transparently from upstream

## Configuration

Configuration precedence: **CLI flags > environment variables > config file > defaults**.

### CLI flags

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--upstream <url>` | Upstream inference URL (required) |
| `--port <n>` | Port to listen on (default: 3000) |
| `--config <path>` | Path to YAML config file |
| `--price <n>` | Default sats per 1k tokens (default: 1) |
| `--max-concurrent <n>` | Max concurrent requests (default: 0 = unlimited) |
| `--storage <type>` | `memory` or `sqlite` (default: memory) |
| `--free-tier <n>` | Free requests per IP per day (default: 0) |
| `--root-key <hex>` | Root key for macaroon signing (auto-generated if omitted) |

### Environment variables

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `UPSTREAM_URL` | Upstream inference URL |
| `ROOT_KEY` | Root key for macaroon signing |
| `PORT` | Port to listen on |
| `STORAGE` | `memory` or `sqlite` |
| `DEFAULT_PRICE` | Default sats per 1k tokens |
| `FREE_TIER_CREDITS` | Free credits (sats) per IP per day |
| `MAX_CONCURRENT` | Max concurrent inference requests |

### YAML config file

The config file (default: `satgate.yaml` in the working directory) accepts all of the above plus:

- `dbPath` — path to the SQLite database file
- `tiers` — array of `{ amountSats, creditSats, label }` objects for volume discount tiers
- `trustProxy` — set `true` when running behind a reverse proxy (uses `X-Forwarded-For` for free tier tracking)
- `estimatedCostSats` — sat amount to hold per request before token count is known (default: `max(defaultPrice * 10, 10)`)
- `maxBodySize` — maximum request body size in bytes (default: 10 MiB)

## Ecosystem

satgate is built on top of **toll-booth** — L402 payment middleware that handles the full invoice → credential → credit flow. toll-booth is payment-rail agnostic and supports Lightning (Phoenixd, LND, Core Lightning, LNbits, Alby), Cashu ecash, and NWC. satgate adds the inference-specific layer: model detection, token counting, cost reconciliation, and capacity management.

The natural client counterpart is **402-mcp** — an MCP server that lets AI agents discover L402 APIs (via `/.well-known/l402`), pay invoices from a connected wallet, and consume the API — all autonomously, with no human in the loop.

```
AI Agent -> 402-mcp -> satgate -> Your inference backend
```

- toll-booth: https://github.com/TheCryptoDonkey/toll-booth
- 402-mcp: https://github.com/TheCryptoDonkey/402-mcp
